description: Render a phylogenetic tree to a publication figure (PNG, PDF, or SVG) with rectangular or circular layout and default node styling.
rules: read-only on input — emits an image file, never edits the source
IMAGE_FORMAT is the output extension: png, pdf, or svg
image (tree.<ext>) + run log (visualize.log) written under record_store
usage: Set TREE_FILE (input Newick tree), IMAGE_FORMAT (png|pdf|svg, default pdf), LAYOUT_MODE (r|c, default r). Outputs: visualize.log (always) and tree.<ext> (when ete3 + Qt backend present).
limitation: Rendering needs ete3 AND a Qt5 backend (system dependency); without them the porter records the failure in visualize.log and exits 0 (no image is produced). Cannot render headless/offline.
